lessons.title: Colors in French
lessons.content: Learn basic colors in French: Rouge (Red), Bleu (Blue), Vert (Green), Jaune (Yellow).

lessons.title: Numbers 1-10
lessons.content: Learn numbers 1 to 10: Un, Deux, Trois, Quatre, Cinq, Six, Sept, Huit, Neuf, Dix.

lessons.title: Greetings
lessons.content: Common greetings: Bonjour (Hello), Salut (Hi), Au revoir (Goodbye).

lessons.title: Days of the Week
lessons.content: Lundi (Monday), Mardi (Tuesday), Mercredi (Wednesday), Jeudi (Thursday), Vendredi (Friday), Samedi (Saturday), Dimanche (Sunday).

lessons.title: Family Members
lessons.content: Mother: Mère, Father: Père, Brother: Frère, Sister: Soeur.

lessons.title: Basic Verbs
lessons.content: Common verbs: être (to be), avoir (to have), aller (to go), faire (to do).

lessons.title: School Objects
lessons.content: Pen: Stylo, Book: Livre, Notebook: Cahier, Chair: Chaise.

lessons.title: Common Phrases
lessons.content: How are you?: Comment ça va?, Thank you: Merci, Please: S'il vous plaît.

lessons.title: Food Vocabulary
lessons.content: Bread: Pain, Cheese: Fromage, Apple: Pomme, Water: Eau.

lessons.title: Simple Sentences
lessons.content: I am happy: Je suis heureux, I have a book: J'ai un livre.

lessons.title: Travel Phrases
lessons.content: Where is…?: Où est…?, I need help: J'ai besoin d'aide.

lessons.title: Advanced Expressions
lessons.content: It's raining cats and dogs: Il pleut des cordes, Better late than never: Mieux vaut tard que jamais.
